message:
✨ Migrate 152 inline badge spans to StatusBadge component (#1937)

Replace hardcoded inline badge patterns (bg-COLOR-500/20 text-COLOR-400
with px/py/rounded/font-medium) with the shared StatusBadge component
across 67 files.

Categories migrated:
- Card status badges (operator, security, compliance, GPU, helm, etc.)
- Workload monitor/detection badges (alerts, health, CI, ML jobs)
- Drilldown view badges (cluster, policy, namespace, CRD, replica set)
- Layout badges (sidebar, snoozed cards, mission sidebar, navbar)
- Dashboard badges (recommendations, factory modals, suggestions)
- Feedback/rewards badges (feature requests, notifications, rewards)

Also updates StatusBadge to:
- Accept standard HTML span attributes (title, role, aria-label, etc.)
- Make children optional (icon-only badges)

Dynamic/conditional badges using ternary expressions or runtime color
lookups were intentionally skipped.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
